name: discord
title: Discord MCP Server
description: Guild discovery, channel lookup, message history, and messaging for Discord servers.

toolDetails.name: discord_list_guilds
toolDetails.description: List all guilds (servers) the bot is in.

toolDetails.name: discord_list_channels
toolDetails.description: List channels in a guild by guild ID.

toolDetails.name: discord_get_messages
toolDetails.description: Fetch recent messages from a channel with an optional limit.

toolDetails.name: discord_send_message
toolDetails.description: Send a message to a channel by channel ID.

toolDetails.name: discord_get_guild_members
toolDetails.description: List members of a guild with an optional limit.
